results.summary: The overwhelming majority of posts mentioning $PLTR in this dataset are low-quality spam, bot-driven WhatsApp group promotions, or multi-ticker promotional lists with no substantive company-specific content. The handful of genuine posts show a long-term options bull rolling 2027 calls at $200–$250 strikes, a modest swing trade setup call with 15–20% upside cited, and one negative sentiment post raising data privacy concerns around Palantir's surveillance capabilities. Signal quality is extremely low due to spam saturation, rendering meaningful sentiment extraction unreliable.
